name: Best Practices for Exchange Volatility Control Mechanisms
snippet: If the 7% or 13% breakers are triggered, the markets are paused for 15 minutes; if the 20% breaker is triggered, the markets are closed for the trading day.

name: Market Circuit Breakers: 7%, 13%, 20% Trading Halt Rules
snippet: Market-wide circuit breakers are automatic mechanisms that halt all stock trading when the S&P 500 drops 7%, 13%, or 20% in a single day.
